reviewsSummary.notes: Subagents failed due to model configuration (custom:minimax-m2.7 not available in subagent context). Direct code review performed instead.

fix-layout-structure-footer-banner.notes: Footer correctly outside flex row in Layout.tsx. Content wrapped in .app-layout__content flex row. Footer is block element below.

fix-layout-main-content-width.notes: .app-layout__main has flex:1; min-width:0. Welcome card uses max-width:700px with margin:0 auto for centering.

fix-session-page-content.notes: MeditationChat renders on /session. NavLink isActive logic ensures correct active state.

fix-mobile-nav-position.notes: Navigation uses position:fixed; bottom:0 with z-index. Layout.css adds padding-bottom:80px to prevent content overlap.

fix-profile-page-mobile.notes: ProfileDisplay renders correctly at mobile. No card nesting issues.

fix-history-page-mobile.notes: SessionHistory component renders at 375px with session list.

fix-nav-active-states.notes: NavLink uses isActive class properly. Home uses end={item.path === '/'} for exact match.

fix-nav-labels-at-desktop.notes: Navigation.css shows labels at 1200px+ with width:240px. Labels visible at desktop and tablet.

fix-css-file-conflicts.notes: App.css contains only global .app styles. HomePage.css has all .home-page related styles.

fix-duplicate-content-home.notes: Home header removed from HomePage.tsx. Disclaimer appears in footer + optionally in welcome card.

fix-card-nesting.notes: ProfileDisplay.css: no border/shadow/background. Renders as inline content within welcome-card.

fix-button-consistency.notes: Button styles use consistent CSS variables for border-radius, colors, transitions.

fix-text-hierarchy.notes: Welcome, {name} uses h1 with text-4xl. Welcome to OpenMarcus uses h3 with text-xl subordinate.

fix-settings-mobile-routing.notes: React Router routes correctly render different pages at 375px.

fix-onboarding-mobile.notes: OnboardingScreen uses full-width inputs and 44px min-height buttons.

fix-begin-meditation-ux.notes: HomePage handleBeginMeditation calls beginSession BEFORE navigate to /session, so session starts immediately.

fix-voice-input-error-message.notes: VoiceInputManager.handlePermissionError sets actionable error message. SttOfflineError includes start command.

fix-voice-output-icon-states.notes: CSS defines: --disabled (grey muted speaker), --enabled (gold speaker), --speaking (gold + animated sound waves).

fix-session-detail-mobile.notes: Session detail page layout properly responsive at 375px.
